exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your book club forward
items: Research and compile a list of 10-15 potential book titles across different genres for your book club to vote on
Set up a voting system and timeline for members to select your book club\
Create a detailed book selection criteria checklist that includes reading time, discussion potential, and member accessibility considerations
Contact local bookstores and libraries to establish group discounts and reserve copies for your book club selections
Survey your book club members about their reading preferences, trigger topics, and accessibility needs to create a member preference profile
Establish a backup book selection system for when voting ties occur or the chosen book becomes unavailable
